title: Emu/Tern CC battery - CC battery level less than 30%, yellow icon
scenario: Charging case battery icon on Home screen does not display yellow when battery level is below 30%
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device (e.g., Voyager 5200, Free 60+) is connected.
Place the device in its charging case.
Allow the charging case battery level to drop below 30%.
Observe the battery icon displayed on the Home screen for the charging case.
expected: The charging case battery icon on the Home screen displays as yellow when the battery level is below 30%.
